task_description: Phase 3: Animated 3D Fault Simulation for the el-dimensionering SLD module. Allows users to click any point on the installation SLD to inject a fault, animates fault current flow with 3D neon glow visual effects, shows which protection device trips first based on time-current curves, verifies DS/HD 60364-4-41 disconnection requirements, and displays comprehensive results including selectivity analysis.
